name: KIDOZ INC.
business: Kidoz Inc. is a mobile advertising technology company that owns the Kidoz Safe Ad Network, the Kidoz SDK, and the Kidoz Connect programmatic solution, selling advertising technology to app developers and global advertisers.

exposures.sentence: Kidoz Inc. (TSXV: KIDZ) is a mobile advertising technology company and owner of the KIDOZ Safe Ad Network ( www.kidoz.net ) and the Kidoz Publisher Software Development Kit ( SDK ).

Trusted by Disney, Hasbro, Lego and more, the Kidoz Contextual Ad Network helps the world s largest brands to safely reach and engage kids across thousands of mobile apps, websites and video channels.

tamClaims.claim: The mobile advertising ecosystem is projected to exceed over US$400 billion by 2023.
tamClaims.sentence: The size of the mobile advertising ecosystem is projected by eMarketer to exceed over US$400 billion by 2023 (eMarketer).

tamClaims.claim: The global app install segment of mobile advertising is estimated to be US$118B in 2022.
tamClaims.sentence: The global app install segment of mobile advertising is estimated to be US$118B in 2022 according to AppsFlyer.
